description: Event serializer with Marshal/Unmarshal pair — Strict mode triggers mandatory property-based roundtrip test in addition to table-driven boundary cases
code_snippet:
func (e *EventEncoder) Marshal(event *Event) ([]byte, error)
func (e *EventEncoder) Unmarshal(data []byte) (*Event, error)
expected_killer_hypothesis: unmarshal silently drops optional fields present in the original event
